dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses pivot point as the key reference level. The 'pivot' indicator (highest high or lowest low in center of 1-3 days on either side) directly matches the source definition. Entry triggers on upward price crossing above this pivot in a trend-following context. Exit condition reversed per AUTHOR_SILENT rule — exit on downward crossing below pivot (logical reversal for trend-following long). No explicit stop loss or hold period specified in source material.

source_rule_text: Buy on an upwards move through the previous pivot point in a trend-following approach.
